Electrical problem? Text us a photo.
Eddie calls back in minutes with a real estimate.

Text a photo →
40 years in business
4.6★ Yelp · ~90 reviews
24/7 emergency response

Take a photo of your breaker, outlet, or fixture. Text it to us with your address. Eddie reviews it and calls you back — usually within ten minutes. No hold music. No dispatch center. Just a direct line to the person doing the work.

Open Messages →

What we do

  • —
    Panel upgrades & replacements Outdated Zinsco, Federal Pacific, or fuse boxes replaced with code-compliant 100–200A systems. Permit filing handled.
  • —
    EV charger installation 240V Level 2 circuits with load balancing. We make sure your existing panel can handle it before we run a single wire.
  • —
    24/7 emergency calls Power out, burning smell, tripping breakers. We respond throughout San Francisco and Daly City, any hour.
  • —
    Wiring, outlets & GFCI Full rewires, condo conversions, kitchen and bathroom circuits, code-compliant shock protection throughout.
  • —
    Lighting & appliances Track lighting, dimmers, exhaust fans, ceiling fans, and dedicated high-draw appliance outlets.
  • —
    Doorbells & intercoms Smart video doorbell wiring and intercom installation or repair.

"Eddie arrived within 40 minutes of my text. He diagnosed the short, replaced the GFCI outlet, and had everything back on before dinner. Direct, fast, fair."

Yelp review — 5 stars
